'''Garnants''' were small purple insects that lived in underground hives on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]], and communicated via vibrations and scent. They had stinging bites.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Tide I: Onslaught]]'' {{1st}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
